/usr/bin/c++  -lpthread -g CMakeFiles/jsm.crossing-detector-front.dir/CrossingReader/crossing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jsm.crossing-detector-front.dir/Web/web.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jsm.crossing-detector-front.dir/jsm.crossing-detector-front.cpp.o -o jsm.crossing-detector-front  -Wl,-rpath,/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.1.1_1/lib: /usr/local/lib/libdrogon.a /usr/local/lib/libtrantor.a /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.1.1_1/lib/libssl.so /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.1.1_1/lib/libcrypto.so -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libuuid.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlidec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlienc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlicommon.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
